steps.title: Identify what both texts address
steps.content:
Text 1 discusses the challenges scientists face when studying living sloths in the wild and what they can learn from sloth fossils.

Text 2 describes new methods scientists are using to study tree-dwelling sloths, specifically how backpack monitors reveal previously hidden behaviors.

The shared focus across both texts is scientific study of sloths.

steps.title: Match the shared theme to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly names this focus—the scientific study of sloths.

Text 1 explains why field observation is challenging; Text 2 shows how new technology overcomes those challenges.

The other three options either introduce topics not discussed in either text, shift focus to animal care rather than study, or mischaracterize what Text 2 covers.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
